# .NET 10 Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading the LiveShaping WPF desktop application from .NET Framework 4.8 to .NET 10. Using all-at-once strategy with atomic SDK-style conversion and framework update, followed by breaking change resolution.

**Progress**: 1/4 tasks complete <progress value="25" max="100"></progress> 25%

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-convert-to-sdk-style: Convert project to SDK-style format ([Content](tasks/01-convert-to-sdk-style/task.md), [Progress](tasks/01-convert-to-sdk-style/progress-details.md))
- 🔄 02-update-target-framework: Update target framework to .NET 10 ([Content](tasks/02-update-target-framework/task.md))
- 🔲 03-resolve-breaking-changes: Fix API incompatibilities and breaking changes
- 🔲 04-validate-upgrade: Final testing and validation
